ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-05-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar Dec-08-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Patrick J. Kirby, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, WEBCOR CONSTUCTION, LP DBA WEBCOR BUILDERS, a California Limited Partnership,
No appearance by defaulted defendant ZETIAN SYSTEMS WEST, INC.,
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.

Witness: Kurt Ricci sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:

Damages: $20,041,384.27
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $92,016.82
Costs: $2,752.30
Total Judgment in the amount of $20,136,153.39

Counsel to submit judgment for Court signature.
